_note: Liu Bei retreats from Xinye; Zhao Zilong rescues the infant Liu Shan at Changban. Autumn 208.
Zhang Fei holds Long Slope Bridge (Battle of Changban). Late 208.
Zhuge Liang debates Sun Quan's scholars at Chaisang; Sun Quan begins to consider war. Autumn 208.
Zhuge Liang provokes Zhou Yu (Bronze Bird Tower / Two Qiaos rhetoric); Sun Quan commits to fight Cao Cao. Late 208.
Jiang Gan's mission; Cao Cao executes the suborned admirals Cai Mao and Zhang Yun. Late 208 (Red Cliffs prologue).
Zhuge Liang borrows 100,000 arrows in the mist; Huang Gai accepts the personal-injury (flesh-suffering) ruse. Late 208.
Kan Ze delivers Huang Gai's false-surrender letter; Pang Tong tricks Cao Cao into chaining the ships.
Cao Cao's 'Short Song' banquet on the Yangtze; first naval skirmish; Cao Cao's omens of disaster. Eve of Red Cliffs (11th lunar month, 208).
Zhuge Liang's southeast-wind ritual at Seven-Star Altar; Huang Gai's fire-ships destroy Cao Cao's fleet — Battle of Red Cliffs (lunar 11th month, Jian'an 13 = late 208).
Cao Cao's flight through Huarong Valley; Guan Yu repays his debt by letting him pass. Late 208 into early 209.
